name: Big N denominator count by group
label: Total N (per group)
description: Distinct count of the analysis variable (typically USUBJID) per treatment group. Used as the N= header / denominator source. Verified against Common_Safety_Displays Mth01_CatVar_Count_ByGrp; current cards API.
